Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\j.turdimatov\\Desktop\\manzillar" && grep -rl "error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'" --include="*.ts" app/ | xargs sed -i "s/const message = error instanceof Error ? error\\.message : 'Unknown error';\\n.*return Response\\.json\({ success: false, error: message }, { status: 500 }\);/return Response.json\({ success: false, error: 'INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR' }, { status: 500 }\);/g")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\j.turdimatov\\Desktop\\manzillar" && python -c "
import os, re

pattern = re.compile\(
    r\\"    const message = error instanceof Error \\? error\\.message : 'Unknown error';\\n    return Response\\.json\\\(\\{ success: false, error: message \\}, \\{ status: 500 \\}\\\);\\",
    re.MULTILINE
\)
replacement = \\"    return Response.json\({ success: false, error: 'INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR' }, { status: 500 }\);\\"

for root, dirs, files in os.walk\('app/api'\):
    dirs[:] = [d for d in dirs if d != 'node_modules']
    for f in files:
        if f.endswith\('.ts'\):
            path = os.path.join\(root, f\)
            content = open\(path\).read\(\)
            new_content = pattern.sub\(replacement, content\)
            if new_content != content:
                open\(path, 'w'\).write\(new_content\)
                print\('Fixed:', path\)
")
